title: VOVAI Production Rubric Schema
description: Rubric for grading individual artifacts (scripts, images, videos, documents, assessments, activities). Used in Phases 1-5 of the production pipeline. Each rubric has exactly 5 dimensions scored on a 1-10 scale.

name.description: Human-readable rubric name, e.g. 'Script Quality Rubric'

domain.description: Which product domain this rubric belongs to, e.g. 'elearn'

stage.description: Which pipeline stage uses this rubric, e.g. 'V2' for script writing

threshold.description: Minimum composite score (1-10) to pass without revision

dimensions.description: Exactly 5 evaluation dimensions. Weights must sum to 1.0.

weight.description: Weight for composite score. All weights must sum to 1.0.

scoreLevels.description: Score band descriptions for the judge
